description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The front display shows a grid of colorful app icons, a time display, and a black notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is matte black with a prominent silver Apple logo centered and a triple-lens camera array with flash in the top left corner. The sides are thin and metallic, with visible buttons and a subtle red accent on one side, likely for the mute switch. The device is slim, with a slightly raised camera bump on the back. The overall appearance is minimalist and premium, typical of high-end smartphones used in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a centered Apple logo. The device has a minimalist, premium design with metallic sides and visible side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass touchscreen with app icons, time display, and a black notch at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the device and a slight camera bump, with a visible button and red accent.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte black finish, centered Apple logo, and triple camera array with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the thin metallic edge and absence of visible buttons on this side.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting against the matte black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a typical smartphone home screen with app icons, a clock showing 14:38, and a black wallpaper. The top notch contains status icons and the front camera.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array with three lenses and a flash, arranged in a square module at the top left corner on the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides: a power button on the right edge, and volume buttons with a red-accented mute switch on the left edge.
